title: Silken Dutch Tofu Steam
description: A quick-fix, nutty, and creamy Jain-friendly dish made with silken tofu and steam, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Rinse the silken tofu and cut it into 1-inch cubes.
In a steamer basket, combine the tofu cubes and nutritional yeast.
Place the steamer basket over boiling water and steam for 5 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
This dish is best served immediately, as it can become soggy if left to sit for too long.
For a creamier dish, you can add a tablespoon of soy sauce or tamari to the steamer before cooking.
You can also add some chopped garlic or ginger to the steamer for extra flavor.
Make sure to check the tofu regularly to prevent overcooking.
Use a thermometer to ensure the steam is at a safe temperature (165°F/74°C).
